name: Garlic Knots
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2 Once dough has risen, separate into two pieces. Set half aside for use another time.
3 Divide remaining dough into golf ball-sized pieces.
4 Roll each ball into a 4-inch to 6-inch long piece.
5 Loop dough into a pretzel-shaped knot.
6 Add garlic to olive oil.
7 Roll knots in oil.
8 Bake for 8-10 minutes, until golden brown.
